sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n89607" key="pro/sklima" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πρόσ-κλῐμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">προσκλίνω</etym>) in pl., <sense id="n89607.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">inclinations, interests, PHerc.</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1041.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
